title: UP GNM Age Limit 2026

detail.title: UP GNM Age Limit 2026
detail.short_info: UP GNM Eligibility Criteria 2026 requires a minimum of 17 years of age as on 31 December 2026 and 10+2 with English. Check complete details including domicile, medical fitness, reservation, and In-Service ANM rules for ABVMU UPGET 2026.

content.text: UP GNM Eligibility Criteria 2026 is set by Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University (ABVMU), Uttar Pradesh for admission to the 3-year General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM) diploma course through the UP GNM Entrance Test (UPGET 2026). Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions before applying.

rows: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University (ABVMU), Uttar Pradesh
10+2 with English from a recognized board
NIOS / State Open School 10+2 Vocational ANM Course (40% marks) 10+2 Healthcare Science Stream (40% marks) Registered ANM with passing marks

sections.heading: UP GNM Nationality and Domicile Requirements

content.text: Nationality: Candidates must be Indian citizens. Domicile: Uttar Pradesh domicile is mandatory for admission to Government GNM colleges. Domicile Proof: Valid UP Domicile Certificate OR passing both 10th and 12th from Uttar Pradesh.
Note: Private colleges may admit candidates from other states, but government seats are reserved for UP domicile holders.

sections.heading: UP GNM Medical Fitness & Disability Rules

content.text: All candidates must be medically fit. PWD Reservation: 5% horizontal reservation for Persons with Disability having 40%–50% loco-motor disability of the lower limb. PWD candidates must get their disability verified by a duly constituted medical board of a Government Medical College that includes a nursing expert.

rows: Minimum 5 years in NHM / NRHM / DGMH, U.P.
Certificate issued by CMO (to be submitted by 15 June 2026)
